pass1_value.note: Jira Cloud supports OAuth 2.0 (3LO), OAuth 2.0 client credentials, API tokens (used with basic auth as email:APItoken), and references legacy OAuth 1.0a; documentation page lists these authentication methods.

final_value.note: Unable to verify the authentication methods from the official Jira Cloud authentication documentation because the page is not accessible from the current research environment (HTTP 403 from CloudFront geo-block). The auth_methods list is therefore left unchanged from the existing record, pending access to the primary source content.
